thoughts.analysis: Market structure remains bearish after a failed attempt to breach the 75.06 swing high, resulting in a lower high at 74.98. A bearish Fair Value Gap (FVG) was identified between 74.90 and 74.80. The current price action suggests a distribution phase. I am targeting the sell-side liquidity (SSL) resting below the 74.42 level. Given the 0.6% round-trip fee (approx 0.45 EUR), a target of 73.55 is set to ensure the 50 EUR daily goal is achievable after costs, anticipating a breakdown of the current consolidation range.

The aggressive target of 1735.00 is set to clear the previous high and account for the 0.6% round-trip fees while aiming for the 50 EUR daily profit goal. Stop loss is placed below the recent swing low to maintain a high risk-to-reward ratio.
